submission.implementation_notes: Compiled with Plinth 1.65.0.0 and BuiltinCasing enabled (preview line; requires plutus-core >= 1.65 — not yet on mainnet). Emits the batch-6 `dropList` builtin for cursor gaps of three or more fields in the typed decoder (PREVIEW-gated, so the production build stays byte-identical). This round reads the vesting-token quantity with a bytestring-keyed map lookup (`lookupBytesE`, comparing the unwrapped `CurrencySymbol`/`TokenName` keys with `equalsByteString`) rather than comparing whole `Value` keys with `equalsData`, and re-sweeps the inliner budget for the new shape. total_fee 49805 to 48971 lovelace (-1.7%). Source: lib/LinearVesting.hs (+ `lib/Plinth/Decoder.hs`, `lib/Plinth/Decoder/Named.hs`, `lib/Plinth/Encoded.hs`) in plinth-cape-submissions @ d078652f03d31ed728c1fb63f1d9f8824218494c.
